description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display framed by a moderately thick, black bezel. The front of the monitor features a screen displaying a floor plan, with the bezel providing a clean, uninterrupted border around the display area. The monitor is supported by a circular pedestal stand that connects to the center of the lower bezel, offering stability and a modern aesthetic. The rear of the monitor is plain and unadorned, with no visible ports or branding. The side views reveal the monitor's slim profile and the stand's oval base, emphasizing its minimal footprint. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for office or home environments.
description: A sleek, flat-panel computer monitor with a black bezel and a circular pedestal stand, featuring a modern and minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen with a floor plan, framed by a black bezel and supported by a circular stand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the monitor's slim profile and the oval-shaped base of the stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unmarked back panel with no visible ports or logos.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again showing the thinness of the monitor and the shape of the stand's base.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is moderately thick, black, and has a smooth, glossy finish with sharp corners and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a central pedestal type with a circular, flat base and a short, sturdy neck, all in a matching black material.
attribute_button_placement: Three small buttons are visible on the lower right corner of the front bezel, grouped together.
